license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7m9hk96
title: Breast tumours dissociation
author: Samah El Ghamrasni

steps_raw.instruction: Transfer the tissue onto a 10 cm petri dish
Rinse 1x briefly with ice cold PBS and aspirate PBS off.
Use a blade to carefully cut the sample into small pieces, approximately 3-4 mm in diameter.
Transfer pieces into 50ml tube and Resuspend in 5ml of Base media + Liberase (200ug/ml)
Mix with a 5 ml serological pipet 5 times to break up the pieces.
Let the pellet settle at the bottom of the tube, and transfer supernatant to a new falcon tube (Filter supernatant using 40um mesh)
Resuspend remaining tissue in 2mL of TryplE, incubate for 10 min at 37C
Spin cells down (300g for 10min at 4C) and Resuspend cells in resuspension media
Incubate at room temperature for 15 min
Transfer to ice and proceed to flow sorting
